title: Chart & Visualization Engine Selection (Design Lab Platform)

decisions.statement: ECharts (Apache 2.0) ana chart rendering engine olarak kullanilacak
decisions.rationale: Ucretsiz, full customize, 40+ chart tipi, Superset+Metabase referansi, Canvas+WebGL+SVG destegi, tree-shakeable.

decisions.statement: AG Charts Community (MIT) sadece grid-linked embedded chart icin kullanilacak
decisions.rationale: AG Grid entegrasyonu native. Standalone chart icin ECharts tercih edilir.

decisions.statement: Hybrid rendering: ECharts (dashboard/standalone) + AG Charts (grid-linked) + Canvas/SVG (full custom)
decisions.rationale: Tek engine her senaryoyu kapsamaz. Soyutlama katmani swap riskini elimine eder.

decisions.statement: Design Lab internal sarmalama — uygulama kodunda echarts/ag-charts dogrudan import edilmez
decisions.rationale: forbidden_imports kurali. Design Lab kendi paket kodunda kullanir, tuketici sadece Design Lab API gorur.

decisions.statement: ChartSpec engine-agnostic deklaratif format — tum chart tanimlamalari bu spec uzerinden
decisions.rationale: Engine swap yapilabilir, AI NL->ChartSpec uretebilir, config-driven dashboard.

decisions.statement: Cross-filter bus Zustand store + event emitter hybrid
decisions.rationale: Zustand React-native, minimal, selector-based re-render. Event emitter non-React (AG Grid callback) icin.

decisions.statement: Permission chart katmaninda DEGiL — data pipeline/OpenFGA katmaninda
decisions.rationale: Zanzibar karari (zanzibar-openfga topic) ile uyumlu. Chart zaten filtrelenmis veri alir.

decisions.statement: AI Layer chart platformunun disinda — harici ChartSpec tuketici servis
decisions.rationale: Separation of concerns. AI NL->ChartSpec uretir, chart platform spec render eder.

decisions.statement: Grid abstraction interface simdiden tanimlanacak — AG Grid ilk adapter
decisions.rationale: Uzun vadede AG Grid yetmeyecek, interface tanimi gelecek gecisi kolaylastirir.

decisions.statement: ECharts renderer secimi auto-detect: <5K SVG, 5K-50K Canvas, >50K WebGL
decisions.rationale: ECharts bunu native yapiyor, ustune ek abstraction gereksiz.

decisions.statement: WebGPU 18-24 ay sonra revisit — simdi erken
decisions.rationale: Browser destegi yetersiz (2026 Q1), ECharts WebGL yeterli.

constraints: Tum chart render katmani Design Lab internal — uygulama kodu echarts/ag-charts import edemez
ChartSpec schema (schemas/chart-spec.schema.v1.json) tum chart tanimlarinin SSOT'u
Bundle size CI gate: 350KB gzip limit (ECharts tree-shaking zorunlu)
Accessibility: WCAG 2.1 AA zorunlu — keyboard nav, data table fallback, ARIA, colorblind palettes
Security: XSS sanitization, stream URL whitelist, custom formatter block zorunlu
AG Charts sadece grid-linked senaryolarda — standalone chart icin ECharts
Katman sirasi: P0 gate -> P1 foundation -> P2 interaction -> P3+ enterprise (atlama yok)
Her faz CI gate gecmeden sonraki faza gecilmez

rejected_alternatives.reason: Ticari lisans, yillik ucretli. Apache 2.0 ECharts ayni ozellikleri ucretsiz sunuyor.
Low-level, her chart tipi icin cok fazla kod. ECharts declarative API daha verimli.
Sinirli chart tipleri, buyuk veri performansi zayif, Canvas/WebGL yok.
Ek rendering engine gerektirir, ECharts config zaten declarative. Gereksiz abstraction.
Ticari lisans gerektiriyor. Community yeterli grid-linked icin.
Fazla kompleks, React disinda kalir, ogrenme egrisi yuksek. Zustand daha pragmatik.
Re-render sorunu, non-React bilesenlere ulasamaz (AG Grid callback).
Zanzibar karari: tum authorization OpenFGA uzerinden. Chart zaten filtrelenmis veri alir.

change_log.change: Initial: ECharts hybrid strateji, 11 karar, 8 reddedilen. Claude+Codex istisare sonucu.
